round_focus.default: General review — check spec compliance, code quality, and correctness. Apply cost-benefit analysis: only flag issues where the cost of the bug or maintenance burden clearly outweighs the cost of fixing it. Do NOT request defensive code for unlikely edge cases, speculative future-proofing, or stylistic preferences. Prefer simplification over addition — suggest removing complexity, not adding more code. Flag patch-stacking where layered fixes should be consolidated. If the code works correctly for its intended use cases, approve it.
